ques: Look up recent articles in the Africa news section in World, summarize what topics most of these news are about
answer: Most recent BBC Africa news falls into four main topics: (1) the 2026 World Cup / African football — the biggest theme (Ivory Coast, South Africa, Morocco, Ghana, Egypt, Algeria, Senegal); (2) politics, conflict and geopolitics — Sudan's war and conflict-related sexual violence, Niger quitting the ICC as "neo-colonialist," US sanctions on a Rwanda gold refinery over DR Congo minerals, and Kenya's deadly-protest anniversary; (3) crime, corruption and justice — South Africa's police-corruption scandal, Kenya's school-fire murder charges, and a Zambia ex-president legal battle; and (4) health — the ongoing Ebola outbreak in DR Congo.
